name: Thunderbolt
description: Thunderbolt is one of the two Air Trap Masters in Skylanders: Trap Team.
biography: Epically strong and heroically competitive, Thunderbolt grew up on legendary Mount Cloudpierce. Every year, his people held a contest to determine who would wield the Storm Sword – a legendary blade with the power to change the seasons in Skylands. To Thunderbolt, this would be a great honor. But on the day he won the contest and was about to be presented with the sword, a Frost Mage snatched it and plunged all of Skylands into a wintery deep-freeze. Undaunted, Thunderbolt bravely took chase. Riding twin bolts of chained lightning, he overtook the mage, reclaimed the sword, and restored balance to the weather systems in Skylands. For his heroic actions, Thunderbolt was made a member of the Trap Team, and he now uses his Traptanium Storm Sword to strike evil at every turn!
personality: Thunderbolt is a fierce competitor who faces each opponent with honor and bravery.

story.content: Thunderbolt's body is made up of swirling dark clouds. His back and his stomach both are equipped with a steel plate embedded with the Trap Master logo. His face is light blue with yellow eyes that have red pupils, blue lightning streak eyebrows, and a steel head plating embroidered with the Air element that reaches across his forehead and steel shoulder guards. His hands have four fingers and they are light blue with steel arm guards.

Epically strong and heroically competitive, Thunderbolt grew up on legendary Mount Cloudpierce. Every year, his people held a contest to determine who would wield the Storm Sword – a legendary blade with the power to change the seasons in Skylands. To Thunderbolt, this would be a great honor. But on the day he won the contest and was about to be presented with the sword, a Frost Mage snatched it and plunged all of Skylands into a wintery deep-freeze. Undaunted, Thunderbolt bravely took chase. Riding twin bolts of chained lightning, he overtook the mage, reclaimed the sword, and restored balance to the weather systems in Skylands. For his heroic actions, Thunderbolt was made a member of the Trap Team, and he now uses his Traptanium Storm Sword to strike evil at every turn!

content: The pressure is rising! - when Traptanium Thundersword glows
My energy is surging! - when Traptaniun Thundersword glows
A flurry of treasure! - after opening a treasure chest
Downpour! - after opening a treasure chest
The wind is at my back! - when checking stats
The sky's the limit! - when checking stats
This could be a natural disaster! - when wearing a hat
I look absolutely...striking! - when wearing a hat

trivia: He is similar to Lightning Rod in the following characteristics: Both are Air Skylanders. Both have lower torsos composed of clouds. Both use storm and electrical type attacks. Both of their names are based on electricity.
The name of Thunderbolt's home, Mount Cloudpierce, is similar to Mount Cloudbreak.
His Soul Gem ability has the same name as Cynder's Wow Pow from Skylanders: Giants.

There is a glitch that removes Thunderbolt's cloud and makes him appear without any legs. To perform this, the player must approach the Mirror of Mystery next to the vortex. Pressing the button will allow Glumshanks to come and talk to the Skylander. The player has to press 'NO' when the prompt appears to make the cloud disappear.
In Skylanders: SuperChargers Racing, instead of his regular catchphrase, he says 'Taking the World by Storm'.

trailers.name: Skylanders Trap Team - Thunderbolt's Soul Gem Preview (A Storm Is Coming)

gameplay: Thunderbolt can use his enormous Traptanium Storm Sword, which causes lightning to blast out with every swing, he can also use it to create a tornado that pulls in enemies. Thunderbolt can even shoot storm clouds from his own cloudy body which can shock enemies.

basic.name: Traptanium Thundersword
basic.content: Press Attack 1 to swing the Traptanium Thundersword.

basic.name: Storm Clouds
basic.content: Press Attack 2 to summon a cloud that rains pain down on enemies.

basic_upgrades.name: Lightning Clouds
basic_upgrades.content: Charge up Storm Clouds with the Thunderbolt, causing them to shoot lightning.

basic_upgrades.name: Hurricane Pain
basic_upgrades.content: Press Attack 3 to summon a Twister.

basic_upgrades.name: Hurricane Pain Remains
basic_upgrades.content: Twister lasts longer, does more damage, and sucks in clouds.

soulgems.name: Lightning Rain
soulgems.content: Hold Attack 1 and then press Attack 2 to call in a lightning storm.

abilities.name: Direct Current
abilities.content: Press Attack 1, Attack 1 HOLD Attack 2 for Power Conductor combo.

abilities.name: Thunder Thrust
abilities.content: Press Attack 1, Attack 1, HOLD Attack 3 for a Thunder Thrust combo.

abilities.name: Just Add Lightning
abilities.content: Press Attack 1, Attack 1, HOLD Attack 1 to add some lightning power to your sword slam.

abilities.name: Stormier and Stormier
abilities.content: All lightning attacks have extra range and do increased damage.

abilities.name: Charge It Up!
abilities.content: Charge up Storm Clouds with the Thundersword with extra power.

abilities.name: Exploding Clouds
abilities.content: Storm Clouds can be overcharge with lightning and explode for maximum damage.
